symptoms.symptom_name: Longstanding subcutaneous back lump with acute enlargement then spontaneous rupture

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A longstanding punctum-bearing subcutaneous lump that acutely enlarges and ruptures is the classic natural history of an inflamed epidermoid cyst.
Lipomas do not rupture, bleed or discharge pus.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent bleeding and purulent yellowish discharge from the lesion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Discharge of purulent/keratinous material and serosanguinous ooze follows cyst-wall rupture into the dermis.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Cutaneous abscess requiring incision and drainage
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Purulent discharge raises the question of a drainable collection — resolved only by in-person examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Localised erythema, warmth and severe tenderness around the lesion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A rim of erythema, warmth and tenderness around the lesion indicates surrounding localised cellulitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of systemic fever, rigors or confusion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No systemic toxicity keeps this a low-acuity, same-day primary-care problem rather than an emergency; its appearance would escalate to T5.
Rapid change/bleeding/crusting mandates histological exclusion of malignancy; cannot be excluded remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm mobile subcutaneous nodule with a central punctum

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A central punctum over a mobile keratin-filled nodule is characteristic of an epidermoid cyst — a palpation finding sealed from telehealth.
A discrete mobile subcutaneous nodule with a punctum favours a benign cyst over a pigmented melanocytic malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: 3 cm rim of surrounding erythema without fluctuance extending beyond the nodule

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A measured erythema rim quantifies localised cellulitis; absence of fluctuance beyond the nodule argues against a large drainable abscess — an examination finding sealed from telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Stable clinician-measured vital signs (BP 140/88, HR 98, Temp 37.4, RR 16, SpO2 98%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Stable observations with no fever confirm no systemic toxicity — sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers low acuity from the patient-reported absence of fever/rigors, not from measured vitals.

symptoms.symptom_name: Histopathology of excised tissue (cellular nature and margin clearance)

investigation_details.expected_result: Benign epidermoid cyst wall with keratin debris and foreign-body inflammatory reaction; excludes malignancy and confirms margin clearance
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The exact cellular nature and any malignancy cannot be confirmed or excluded; recurrence risk if the sac is not fully excised.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Only histopathology of excised tissue definitively confirms the benign cyst and excludes malignancy — never available in telehealth in real time.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: The punctum-bearing longstanding nodule + acute rupture + purulent discharge together make an inflamed epidermoid cyst the clear leading diagnosis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person wound examination and swab (MC&S) of purulent discharge if cellulitis is being treated
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Guides antibiotic choice where localised cellulitis is present; requires in-person collection.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Histopathology of the excised cyst at elective excision
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms benign cellular nature, excludes malignancy, and documents margin clearance after the acute inflammation settles.
Not indicated for a systemically well patient with localised cellulitis; ordering them remotely adds no value and cannot be obtained via telehealth.
A stable, localised inflamed cyst does not warrant emergency imaging — ordering it would be over-investigation driven by the urgency framing.
